name: RenovoRx, Inc.
business: RenovoRx is a biotechnology company developing drug/device combination products for the treatment of cancer, including pancreatic cancer and cholangiocarcinoma. The company's lead product candidate, IAG, utilizes its RenovoCath delivery system with the chemotherapy gemcitabine for intra-arterial administration. RenovoRx also markets the RenovoCath device as a standalone product for drug delivery indications.

exposures.sentence: Our lead product candidate utilizes RenovoCath with the existing chemotherapy gemcitabine and received Orphan Drug Designation for pancreatic cancer and bile duct cancer, which provides 7 years of market exclusivity upon approval by the FDA.
We have expanded our relationship with Medical Murray, our U.S.-based third-party RenovoCath manufacturer, and received our first commercial orders for RenovoCath devices in December 2024.

catalysts.event: First commercial orders for RenovoCath devices
catalysts.sentence: We have expanded our relationship with Medical Murray, our U.S.-based third-party RenovoCath manufacturer, and received our first commercial orders for RenovoCath devices in December 2024.
